name: Horizontal Timeline
description: Six-event horizontal timeline with alternating labels above and below the line

fields.TITLE_TEXT: Title shown above the timeline, e.g. 'ATTACK TIMELINE'
fields.DATE_1: Date or time for event 1, e.g. 'JAN 2020'
fields.EVENT_1: Short description of event 1, e.g. 'Initial breach detected'
